subject: [OOM] add helm3 linting
commit_message:
[OOM] add helm3 linting

As OOM supports helm2 and helm3, it's important to check that all new
additions don't break helm3 support.

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I38307e3b105606eb3dded1933e3a90673078d4dc
[Add helm3 job template boilerplate]
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>

Patch Set 4:

(1 comment)

It's great to see helm3 verify job finally but my concern here is that you're configuring a minion for both helm2 and helm3 verify jobs with common script (shell/helm-repo-init.sh) so it will increase time complexity of spawning a minion for helm2 even. I'm assuming here that minions for both jobs (helm2 and helm3) are provisioned in same way (both will have helm2+helm3 installed), unless i'm misunderstanding the flow here? Wouldn't it be faster from job completion time to separate provisioning setup for helm2 and helm3 CI minions?

Patch Set 4:

(2 comments)

> Patch Set 4:
> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> It's great to see helm3 verify job finally but my concern here is that you're configuring a minion for both helm2 and helm3 verify jobs with common script (shell/helm-repo-init.sh) so it will increase time complexity of spawning a minion for helm2 even. I'm assuming here that minions for both jobs (helm2 and helm3) are provisioned in same way (both will have helm2+helm3 installed), unless i'm misunderstanding the flow here? Wouldn't it be faster from job completion time to separate provisioning setup for helm2 and helm3 CI minions?

Here's what I propose:

we keep helm3 as "main" linting system for now.
and I put helm2 linting like image verification (a separate and parallel job).
Would you (Bartek, Krzysztof and Jakub) agree with that?

I'm assuming here that minions for both jobs (helm2 and helm3) are provisioned in same way (both will have helm2+helm3 installed), unless i'm misunderstanding the flow here? Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 4:
> 
> (2 comments)
> 
> > Patch Set 4:
> > 
> > (1 comment)
> > 
> > It's great to see helm3 verify job finally but my concern here is that you're configuring a minion for both helm2 and helm3 verify jobs with common script (shell/helm-repo-init.sh) so it will increase time complexity of spawning a minion for helm2 even. I'm assuming here that minions for both jobs (helm2 and helm3) are provisioned in same way (both will have helm2+helm3 installed), unless i'm misunderstanding the flow here? Wouldn't it be faster from job completion time to separate provisioning setup for helm2 and helm3 CI minions?
> 
> Here's what I propose:
> 
> we keep helm3 as "main" linting system for now.
> and I put helm2 linting like image verification (a separate and parallel job).
> Would you (Bartek, Krzysztof and Jakub) agree with that?

Yes, having two separate verify jobs - one for helm2 and second for helm3 - we get more visibility, if one of them fails we know right away for which helm version the issue occurred, with just one job they would have to peek in the logs to find sort that out.

If you also separate helm2 and helm3 minion provisioning at the same time like I mentioned above that would be additional gain in regard of job ETA 🍺

Patch Set 4: -Code-Review

> Patch Set 4:
> 
> If you also separate helm2 and helm3 minion provisioning at the same time like I mentioned above that would be additional gain in regard of job ETA 🍺

I'm not sure it's easy and possible, AFAIK we're spawning a VM each time we start a verify job so tests would be done in parallel I guess.
